name: wire-registry-metadata-reject
description: An export entry carrying per-export registry metadata (`permission`). The registry-side teaching + gating fields — `permission`, `example`, `gotchas`, `required` — live on each `exports[*]` of the registered descriptor, never on the wire. `gadgetExportUseSchema` admits only the optional prose pair `description`/`usage` and is `.strict()`, so a `permission` field MUST be rejected at parse time.
rejectReason: per-export registry metadata (permission/example/gotchas/required) is descriptor-side, not a wire field; gadgetExportUseSchema is .strict().
